channel.title: dotnet/docs Pull Requests
channel.description: Pull Requests from https://github.com/dotnet/docs, generated by https://github.com/meziantou/IssuesToRss/

item.description:
Summary

  • Clean up article
  • Update ms.date
  • Add alert about version limitation
  • Add query string to correctly link to .NET 4.8

  • Correct headings char casing

Fixes #22200

@hvdbrand @luisquintanilla

item.title: PR: Update preview versions in template - @gewarren
PR: CA1032 documentation does not reflect analyzer behavior. - @rafal-mz
item.description:
Previously analyzer was checking if Exception(SerializationInfo, StreamingContext) ctor is implemented. Currently the analyzer is not raising a warning when this constructor is missing.

I think that to be fair about how analyzer works it would be beneficial to delete Exception(SerializationInfo, StreamingContext) ctor info.

item.title: PR: Update migrate-request-reply.md - @guillermo-ruffino
item.description:
Summary

I believe this is the intended keyword here, as explained in the text itself.

Fixes #Issue_Number (if available)

item.title: PR: simplifying a sentence - @JStatnekov
item.description:
The sentence that describes the relationship between public and private keys was missing a word but really needed to be rephrased

Summary

Describe your changes here.

Fixes #Issue_Number (if available)

item.title: PR: Fix link description - @qt-luigi
item.description:

Fixes #Issue_Number (if available)
